/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=switch -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-result -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -Wno-error=format-truncation -Wno-error=deprecated-declarations -Wno-error=maybe-uninitialized -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -march=native -mtune=generic -march=native -mtune=generic -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/pdcp_tx_benchmark.dir/pdcp_tx_benchmark.cpp.o -o pdcp_tx_benchmark   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so ../../../lib/pdcp/libsrsran_pdcp.a ../../../lib/security/libsrsran_security.a ../../../lib/srslog/libsrslog.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmbedcrypto.so ../../../lib/instrumentation/libsrsran_instrumentation.a ../../../lib/support/libsrsran_support.a ../../../lib/support/network/libsrsran_network.a ../../../lib/srslog/libsrslog.a ../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdw.so
